description_long: This object is a handheld gaming console with a large central screen flanked by two detachable controllers, one blue and one red. The front features a black display bordered by a matte black frame, with the left controller housing a joystick, directional buttons, and smaller function buttons, while the right controller includes another joystick, four action buttons, and additional function buttons. The back of the device is mostly black with the 'Nintendo Switch' logo prominently displayed in white, and the colored controllers are clearly visible from this angle. The side views reveal the slim profile of the device and the protruding buttons and joysticks on each controller. The overall construction appears to be primarily plastic with a glass or acrylic screen, and the device is designed to be portable and ergonomic for handheld use. The object is compact, lightweight, and visually striking due to its contrasting color scheme and modern design.
description: A portable gaming console with a large central screen and detachable blue and red controllers, featuring multiple buttons and joysticks. The device is sleek, compact, and designed for handheld use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large black screen, blue left controller, and red right controller with all main buttons and joysticks visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim profile and the protruding buttons and joysticks on the red controller.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the 'Nintendo Switch' logo on a black surface, with the blue and red controllers attached.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the slim profile and the blue controller's buttons and joystick.
